description: Hybrid retrieval test dataset with keyword and semantic queries
note: Tests keyword precision (sparse) and semantic similarity (dense). Query types: keyword (exact matches), semantic (conceptual), mixed (both help).

# parseJSON Function Documentation

The `parseJSON` function provides safe JSON parsing with comprehensive error handling.

## Usage
```rust
let result = parseJSON(raw_string)?;
```

## Error Cases
- Invalid UTF-8 encoding
- Malformed JSON syntax
- Unexpected end of input

## Performance
Average parsing time: O(n) where n is input length
